testsuite.name: com.meshlink.ble.data.HybridTransportIntegrationTest

testcase.name: when wifi socket receives packet, it is handled as incoming payload

testsuite.system-out: WARNING: No manifest file found at ./AndroidManifest.xml. Falling back to the Android OS resources only. To remove this warning, annotate your test class with @Config(manifest=Config.NONE).
